title: One platform. Two realities.
summary: Launch a logistics simulation workspace or enter the save editing environment with full awareness of impact.
metric_realtime_desc: Shared memory, plugin state and live vehicle signals in one command layer.
metric_platform_desc: Separated simulation and utility flows inside the same desktop platform.
metric_scale_desc: Career systems, installers, finance, fleet control and advanced save operations.
career_desc: Company growth, dispatching, income streams, fleet supervision and live operational awareness.
editor_desc: Direct control over money, XP, vehicles, garages and profile values in a separate workspace.
footer: Choose the operating context first. Simulation and save manipulation remain visually and structurally separated.
